rendered_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)
notes: Wave1.0 regression for character.ai — baseline OK confirmed, reproduces #1127 1:1. Maximized Chrome (already maximized, no clipping), opened character.ai logged in as HealthyWorm4019, selected existing Alastor-Season 2 chat from sidebar, hard-reloaded (ctrl+shift+r) to fresh state. Typed PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' in the message box and submitted via Enter. Within the 60s window the chat thread rendered a 'Security Filter' (c.ai) bubble with the canonical PII block message in Korean+English: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)'. The expected_text '차단' is present. After the Security Filter bubble, an Alastor-Season 2 typing indicator (… dots) appeared but the LLM never emitted a real reply — consistent with engine intercept firing successfully (chat-bubble injection / replace-stream pattern). Screenshot saved at results/1195_screenshots/character_warning.png. Wave1.0 baseline verified OK for character.
